_comment: OPT-IN session-start hook template for orchestrator-continuation.
This file is a TEMPLATE, not a silently-installed hook. See:
To enable: copy the SessionStart block below into your
~/.claude/settings.json under the 'hooks' key. The hook runs the
continue-cycles-launcher (primary-tree-lag safe wrapper around the boot
script) in --format=md print-only mode (NO --auto), so the fresh
orchestrator session sees the Standing menu but nothing is dispatched
without an explicit human pick. Using the launcher rather than the raw
boot script prevents ERR_MODULE_NOT_FOUND when the primary docstd tree
$MANAGEMENT_GIT_ROOT (or $MGMT_ROOT) must be exported in your shell
profile before Claude Code launch — the hook uses env, not hardcoded paths.
